default.description: Bright Future School, Guntur — Quality education, strong values, and a nurturing environment for every child from Pre-Primary to Class 10.

/.title: Bright Future School Guntur | Learning with Values, Discipline & Excellence
/.description: Welcome to Bright Future School, Guntur — a premier school offering quality education from Pre-Primary to Class 10. Admissions open for 2025–26.

/about.title: About Us | Bright Future School Guntur
/about.description: Learn about Bright Future School's mission, vision, values, and history. Established in 2005. Discover why parents in Guntur trust us with their children's education.

/admissions.title: Admissions | Bright Future School Guntur
/admissions.description: Apply for admission at Bright Future School, Guntur. View the admission process, documents required, eligibility criteria, and important dates.

/academics.title: Academics | Bright Future School Guntur
/academics.description: Explore our academic programmes from Pre-Primary to Class 10. Strong curriculum, experienced teachers, co-curricular activities, and holistic development.

/facilities.title: Facilities | Bright Future School Guntur
/facilities.description: Bright Future School offers modern facilities — smart classrooms, science lab, computer lab, library, playground, transport, and CCTV security.

/gallery.title: Gallery | Bright Future School Guntur
/gallery.description: View photos from Bright Future School — campus, classrooms, events, sports days, labs, and student activities.

/notices.title: Notices & Circulars | Bright Future School Guntur
/notices.description: Stay updated with the latest notices, circulars, exam schedules, and announcements from Bright Future School, Guntur.

/downloads.title: Downloads | Bright Future School Guntur
/downloads.description: Download school documents — admission form, prospectus, fee structure, academic calendar, transport form, and school handbook.

/fee-structure.title: Fee Structure | Bright Future School Guntur
/fee-structure.description: View the fee structure at Bright Future School, Guntur. Class-wise fee details for all sections. Contact the school office for confirmed figures.

/contact.title: Contact Us | Bright Future School Guntur
/contact.description: Get in touch with Bright Future School, Guntur. Phone, WhatsApp, email, office hours, directions, and online enquiry form.
